name: l2_powered_cruise_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseAcceptanceGate aggregates per-preset powered cruise validation results into a gameplay coupling decision.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC L2 powered-cruise gameplay acceptance gating.

name: l2_powered_cruise_validation
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseValidation supplies the baseline-subtracted force moment and center-of-force pass/fail result for each preset.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC L2 powered-cruise gameplay acceptance gating.

name: l2_powered_cruise_experiment_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseExperimentPlan supplies the current four-preset powered-cruise validation target set.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC L2 powered-cruise gameplay acceptance gating.

name: l2_bridge_force_moment
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge.L2ForceMomentSample is the compact live L2 output shape expected before this gate can open.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC L2 powered-cruise gameplay acceptance gating.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future edgewise powered source-term force and moment validation.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC L2 powered-cruise gameplay acceptance gating.

name: gameplay_gate
value: Gate remains closed until powered source-term API support is available and every preset passes baseline-subtracted forward-flight cruise force/moment validation.
note: The only open scenario has powered-source API support true all expected presets present no unexpected results and every cruise validation result passing.
